cards.title: Hypertension — BNYS Complete Protocol
cards._legacyHtml:
Stage 1 HTN (AHA 2017)
130–139 / 80–89 mmHg
Stage 2 HTN
≥140 / ≥90 mmHg
Emergency threshold
BP >180/110 + organ damage → refer IMMEDIATELY
ModalityInterventionExpected ↓ BP
DASH diet ★High fruit/veg/whole grains, low Na (<2.3g/day), low saturated fat↓11/3 mmHg
Na restriction<2g Na/day. Avoid processed foods + pickles.↓5/3 mmHg
Aerobic exercise30–45 min/day walking/cycling × 5 days/week↓5–8/4 mmHg
Magnesium glycinate ★400–600 mg/day↓3–4/2 mmHg meta-analysis
CoQ10100–200 mg/day (ubiquinol)↓11/7 mmHg in deficient patients
Hibiscus tea2 cups/day strong brew (5g dried flower)↓7/3 mmHg (comparable to ACEi in mild HTN)
Garlic (aged extract)600–1500 mg/day standardised allicin↓5/3 mmHg
Savasana + Yoga Nidra ★30–45 min/day. Activates PNS, ↓ sympathetic tone.↓5–10/5–8 mmHg RCTs
Slow breathing (6/min)4-6-8 breathing, 15 min/day↓4/3 mmHg via vagal activation
HydrotherapyNeutral bath 37°C 20 min; alternating foot immersionPeripheral vasodilation, ↓SVR
⚠️ Refer if BP >160/100 or end-organ damage
BNYS protocols are adjunctive — co-manage with physician in moderate–severe HTN.

cards.title: Asthma — BNYS Protocol
cards._legacyHtml:
Maintain reliever inhaler access at all times
BNYS is complementary — never advise stopping prescribed inhalers.
ModalityTechniqueEvidence
Pranayama ★Bhramari 5 min + Anuloma-Viloma 10 min + Ujjayi 5 min. Twice daily.↑FEV1, ↓bronchial hyperreactivity. Multiple RCTs.
Buteyko breathingNasal breathing + breath holds. ↓ hyperventilation, ↑ CO₂ tolerance.↓Reliever use by 90% (McHugh RCT 2003)
Yoga asanasMatsyasana, Bhujangasana, Dhanurasana. 45 min/day. Avoid Halasana in acute phase.↑PEFR, ↑FVC, ↓symptom scores
Jal netiDaily nasal irrigation with isotonic salineGrade B — ↓allergen load, ↓upper+lower airway inflammation
Omega-3 2–4g/dayReduces leukotriene production (key mediator in asthma)Grade B — ↓exacerbation frequency
Vitamin D3 ★Target 100–150 nmol/L (2000–4000 IU/day)Grade A — ↓severe exacerbations by 50% in deficient patients

cards.title: IBS — BNYS Protocol
cards._legacyHtml:
InterventionDetailEvidence
Low FODMAP diet ★★Eliminate: fructose, lactose, fructans, galactans, polyols for 6–8 weeks then reintroduce systematically.Grade A — 75% symptom reduction
Peppermint oil (enteric-coated)0.2ml (187mg) 3× daily before mealsGrade A — 5 RCTs. Comparable to antispasmodics.
Probiotics (strain-specific)Bifidobacterium infantis 35624 for overall IBS. Lactobacillus for IBS-D.Grade B
Gut-directed hypnotherapy8-session protocol. Most effective long-term in refractory IBS.Grade A — 70–80% response
Abdominal massageClockwise oil massage 10 min twice daily. Castor oil pack externally for IBS-C.Grade B
Mindfulness (MBSR)8-week programme — reduces visceral hypersensitivityGrade A

cards.title: Anxiety — BNYS Protocol
cards._legacyHtml:
ModalityInterventionEvidence
Yoga Nidra ★Daily 30–45 min guided practice↓ Cortisol 33%, ↑ GABA (comparable to diazepam iRest studies)
PranayamaAnuloma-Viloma 10 min + Bhramari 5 min twice daily↑ HRV, activates PNS, ↓ sympathetic tone
Ashwagandha ★ (KSM-66)300–600 mg twice daily × 8 weeks↓ Cortisol 28%, ↓ GAD-7, ↓ PSS. RCT grade B
L-theanine200–400 mg/day (or 2–4 cups green tea)↑ Alpha waves, ↓ anxiety without sedation. Works 30–60 min.
Magnesium glycinate300–400 mg at bedtimeNMDA antagonism, ↑ GABA, ↓ HPA axis reactivity
HydrotherapyNeutral bath 37°C 20–30 min. Wet sheet pack. Hip bath.↓ Sympathetic tone, promotes PNS dominance
🟡 Daily vagal toning protocol
Cold water face immersion 30 sec · Gargling 2 min · Humming/chanting (AUM, bhramari) · Slow exhalation (4-7-8 breathing) · Yoga inversions (Sarvangasana if safe). Consistent practice ↑ HRV within 4 weeks. Use HRV app (Elite HRV, Welltory) to track progress objectively.

cards.title: T2DM, PCOS & Migraine — BNYS Protocols
cards._legacyHtml:
TYPE 2 DIABETES — BNYS Protocol
ModalityInterventionEvidence
HydrotherapyNeutral bath 33–35°C 20 min daily. Hot foot bath 15 min before sleep (neuropathy). Contrast foot bath (microcirculation).Moderate
Mud therapyMud pack abdomen 30 min daily (pancreatic stimulation). Full mud bath 2x/week.Moderate
Yoga ★Surya Namaskar 12 rounds daily. Ardha Matsyendrasana, Paschimottanasana, Dhanurasana, Halasana. Kapalbhati 15 min + Anulom Vilom 10 min daily.Strong — RCTs show HbA1c reduction
DietLow-GI: remove white rice, refined flour, sugar, fruit juices. Raw vegetable juices AM (bitter gourd 50ml + amla 30ml). Small frequent meals. Fibre 30g/day.Strong
SupplementsBerberine 500mg TDS, Bitter melon 500mg BD, Fenugreek 10g soaked seeds/day, ALA 600mg, Chromium 400mcg, Mg 400mg, Vit D3 4000IU.Good
PCOS — BNYS Protocol
ModalityIntervention
HydrotherapyHot sitz bath 38–40°C 15 min daily (pelvic circulation). Cold sitz 1 min alternating (tones pelvic organs).
Yoga ★Baddha Konasana, Dhanurasana, Bhujangasana, Naukasana (stimulates ovaries). Kapalbhati 15 min reduces LH surge. Nadi Shodhana 10 min.
SupplementsMyo-inositol 4g + D-chiro 100mg daily ★, Vitex 400mg AM, NAC 600mg TDS, Zinc 30mg, Vit D3 5000IU, Omega-3 3g.
LifestyleWeight loss 5–10% restores ovulation in 50%. Low-GI diet. Eliminate dairy (reduces IGF-1 and androgens). Spearmint tea 2 cups/day (anti-androgenic).
MIGRAINE PREVENTION — BNYS Protocol
ModalityIntervention
Supplements ★Magnesium glycinate 600mg/day ★ (Grade A), Riboflavin B2 400mg/day ★ (Grade A), CoQ10 300mg/day ★, Feverfew 50mg/day, Melatonin 3mg night.
YogaShavasana 20 min daily. Nadi Shodhana 15 min. Viparita Karani. Avoid Kapalbhati if triggers headache.
HydrotherapyCold pack forehead/temples + hot foot bath simultaneously (diversion therapy). Rest in dark quiet room.
Trigger avoidanceHALT (Hunger, Anger/stress, Late sleep, Tired). Food triggers: aged cheese, red wine, chocolate, MSG, nitrates. Fixed sleep-wake cycle. Hydration 2.5L/day.

cards.title: NAFLD, Arthritis, Psoriasis & Thyroid — BNYS Protocols
cards._legacyHtml:
NAFLD — BNYS Protocol
ModalityInterventionEvidence
Diet ★Mediterranean diet. Remove: fructose ★ (no sugary drinks/juices — MOST IMPORTANT), refined carbs, alcohol completely. Add: coffee 2–3 cups/day (↓ fibrosis 40%), green tea, cruciferous vegetables.Strong
Exercise ★150–300 min aerobic + 3x resistance/week. Exercise reduces hepatic fat independent of weight loss.Strong
SupplementsMilk thistle (silymarin) 200mg TDS ★, Vit E 800IU/day (PIVENS trial — non-diabetics), Omega-3 3g, Berberine 500mg TDS, NAC 600mg BD.Good–Strong
ARTHRITIS — BNYS Protocol
TypeHydrotherapyYogaSupplements
OsteoarthritisWarm bath 38–40°C daily. Wax bath hands/feet. Fomentation 20 min local.Gentle ROM. Viparita Karani. Chair yoga if limited mobility.Glucosamine 1500mg + chondroitin 1200mg, Boswellia 400mg TDS, Omega-3 3g, Vit D3 4000IU.
Rheumatoid arthritisWarm paraffin bath (hands). Tepid neutral bath during flare.Gentle stretching in remission. Yoga Nidra for pain.Fish oil EPA 3–6g ★, Curcumin 1g BD, Probiotics VSL#3, Vit D3 4000IU, Folate (if on MTX).
GoutCold mud pack during acute attack. Neutral bath intercritical.Avoid weight-bearing during attack.Tart cherry 240ml BD, Vit C 1500mg, Hydration 3L/day. No fructose, alcohol, red meat.
PSORIASIS + HYPOTHYROIDISM — BNYS Protocols
ConditionKey BNYS Interventions
PsoriasisDead Sea salt bath 25g/L × 30 min 3x/week. UV exposure 15–20 min daily. Mud bath 2x/week. Fish oil EPA 4g/day ★, Vit D3 5000IU, Zinc 30mg. Gluten-free if anti-gliadin Ab positive. Eliminate alcohol.
HypothyroidismCold friction rub daily (cervical nerve stimulation). Hot/cold throat compress 3:1 min × 5 cycles. Sarvangasana ★ (↑ thyroid blood flow), Matsyasana, Halasana, Ujjayi pranayama. Selenium 200mcg/day ★ (reduces TPO Ab 40–60%), Ashwagandha 300mg BD.

cards.title: Insomnia, Obesity & CKD — BNYS Protocols
cards._legacyHtml:
INSOMNIA — BNYS Protocol
ModalityInterventionEvidence
HydrotherapyWarm bath 38–40°C 20 min, 1–2hrs before bed. Warm foot bath 15 min at bedtime. Cold shower in morning (sets circadian anchor).Strong
Yoga ★Yoga Nidra 30 min before bed (= 4hrs sleep in brainwave restoration). Savasana, Viparita Karani, Balasana. Nadi Shodhana 10 min. No vigorous yoga within 2hrs of bedtime.Strong
CBT-IGold standard — sleep restriction + stimulus control + cognitive restructuring. Fixed sleep-wake time. No screens 1hr before bed.Strong (gold standard)
SupplementsMg glycinate 400mg night, Ashwagandha 300mg BD, Valerian 500mg night, Passionflower 300mg, Melatonin 0.5–3mg, L-theanine 200mg.Good
OBESITY — BNYS Protocol
ModalityIntervention
HydrotherapyCold bath/shower daily (activates brown adipose tissue, increases metabolic rate). Salt glow scrub 3x/week. Sauna 20 min 3x/week (if no cardiac disease).
Mud therapyFull mud bath 45 min 3x/week. Abdominal mud pack 30 min daily.
Yoga + ExerciseSurya Namaskar 20–30 rounds/day. Kapalbhati 20 min (activates abdominal fat metabolism). 150–300 min aerobic + 3x resistance/week.
DietIntermittent fasting 16:8. Low-GI, high-fibre diet. Eliminate: sugar, fried foods, refined carbs, alcohol. TRE (8–10 hr eating window).
CKD adjunctRenal diet: protein 0.6–0.8g/kg/day. Low K (<2000mg/day), low P (<800mg/day), low Na (<2g/day). Avoid: star fruit ★ (fatal neurotoxicity in CKD), high-K foods (banana, potato, tomato). Gentle yoga. Avoid NSAIDs and nephrotoxic herbs (aristolochic acid).
